untranslatable_reason: The pattern requires identification of a down-sloping trend line and measurement of prior resistance/pattern highs. These require visual pattern recognition and multi-bar trend line fitting, which cannot be expressed with the allowed indicators and operators. The signal references 'down-sloping trend line', 'prior resistance', 'highest high in the pattern', and 'old high' — all requiring custom pattern detection logic not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using pivot points (s1 as support/prior resistance proxy) and volume confirmation, but true Bump-and-Run Reversal Bottoms pattern detection requires trend line drawing capability not present in allowed indicators.
